data.name: Intro
data.value: I'm always available to discuss interesting projects, collaboration opportunities, or answer technical questions.

data.name: Section_Email_Body
data.value: The best way to reach me is via email:

data.name: Section_Social_Body
data.value: You can also find me on the following platforms:

data.name: Section_Privacy_Body
data.value: This site does not collect or store any personal information through contact forms. When you send me an email, your data will be handled according to the privacy policy of the email service you use.
